lineage.selection_rule: W2-A iteration: same xs_alpha_ontology_v1_score (v91 9 baseline + F33 + F12), portfolio construction widened from default top-3 long-only equal-weight to top-7 long-only equal-weight. Targets cycle strict-validation blocker #4 (execution_stress capacity binding on BTC/ETH/PAXG concentration) by spreading capital to 7 names instead of 3. Same horizon, same universe, same score sign convention.

candidates_admitted.admission_classification_note: G6 strict floor is 0.020; F12 unrounded residual IC is 0.0195, below floor by 0.0005. Admitted on the basis of the displayed-rounded value at W1.4 sign-off; re-classified as boundary by the Week 2 exit verifier on 2026-04-29. See threshold_provenance.md 'Alpha Ontology Week 2 exit verification' entry. Cycle-level evidence will determine retention vs demotion.

candidates_deferred_with_reason.reason: G6 PASS but G3 FAIL (33% same-sign); sparse-event factor; residual IC suspected of zero-observation inflation
G6 FAIL (residual IC = +0.008, < 0.02); slow-variable, candidate for regime gating layer rather than score

thesis_profile.market_mechanism: W2-A portfolio construction iteration on top of xs_alpha_ontology_v1_score. Widens long-only top-K from 3 to 7 names equal-weight to break BTC/ETH/PAXG capacity binding while keeping the score and sign convention identical. Hypothesis: spreading the long basket reduces max_trade_participation_rate per name and reduces single-quarter edge concentration without materially diluting rank IC, since v_alpha_v1 score already ranks the 99-asset universe with rank IC +0.180 at the cycle layer.
thesis_profile.directional_claim: rank top-7 liquid perp-covered names by the same 11-factor signed z-score score as v_alpha_v1; equal-weight long. Expected: maintain walk-forward median sharpe near v_alpha_v1 (+1.030); reduce execution_stress max_trade_participation_rate below the 0.005 strict cap; reduce factor_evidence.max_positive_contribution_ratio below 0.50 by spreading the basket across more names. Falsified if combined IC drops > 0.005 vs v_alpha_v1 OR walk-forward median sharpe drops below v91 baseline (+0.85) OR execution_stress capacity_breach_count remains above 4 windows out of 32.

archived_reason: Falsified by W2-A iteration 1 cycle on 2026-04-29: equal-weight top-K widening from 3 to 7 names collapsed walk_forward median sharpe from +1.030 to -0.229 and increased loss_window_fraction from 34.4% to 50.0%. The xs_alpha_ontology_v1_score edge is concentrated at the top of the ranking; names 4-7 dilute the basket below positive expectation. The hypothesis "wider K equal-weight long-only spreads capacity exposure without diluting alpha" is empirically rejected for this score. lsk3 long-short construction is the alpha-ontology-track active candidate.
